source: Crossref REST API cross-check, 2026-07-13 (workflow wf_f10af580). Each DOI retrieved and its title/first-author/year/venue cross-checked against the claim; no DOI guessed. status: verified=claim correct; corrected=DOI/metadata fixed; unresolved=not groundable.
